title: Bridge Essay: What is the Relation between Chemosensory Perception and Chemosensory Mental Ima

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** (Phase 10) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Imaginal to mechanistic neuroscience through What, is, the, Relation, between.

**What is the Relation between Chemosensory Perception and Chemosensory Mental Imagery?** — Multisens Res. PMID: 39191424. DOI: 10.1163/22134808-bja10130. The study of chemosensory mental imagery is undoubtedly made more difficult because of the profound individual differences that have been reported in the vividness of (e.g.) olfactory mental imagery. At the same time, the majority of those researchers who have attempted to study people'smental imagery abilities for taste (gustation) have actually mostly been studying flavour mental imagery.
